---
title: "auth.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/node/pennyone/auth.test.ts"
loc: 44
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.00
style_score: 4.52
intel_score: 7.76
overall_score: 4.87
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [startBridge](file://../../../src/tools/pennyone/vis/server.js)
- [*](file://http)
- [*](file://fs)
- [*](file://path)

### Exports
- `PORT`
- `statsDir`
- `signetPath`
- `token`
- `i`
- `url`
- `match`
- `resUnauthorized`
- `resAuthorized`
- `req`
